fault_type: rrt rrt_max pod_network_receive_bytes pod_network_receive_packets pod_network_transmit_bytes pod_network_transmit_packets
symptom_vector: Network packet corruption and data corruption causing bit errors on network with corrupted packets

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [checkoutservice, paymentservice] experienced [rrt, rrt_max, pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty components are [checkoutservice, paymentservice] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [Error, while, dialing] in Log (From GT key_observations: 'transport: Error while dialing dial tcp 10.233.55.4:50051: i/o timeout')

Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [Rpc, error, code, canceled, desc, context canceled] in Log (From GT key_observations: 'failed to complete the order: rpc error: code = Canceled desc = context canceled')
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [timeout] in Log (From GT key_observations: 'i/o timeout' and 'timed out waiting for server handshake')
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [unavailable] in Log (From GT key_observations: 'rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = timed out waiting for server handshake')
Step 6: Check Observation - Found keyword [checkoutservice, frontend] in Trace (From GT key_observations: Trace data shows frontend->checkoutservice->paymentservice call chain anomalies)
Step 7: Check Observation - Found keyword [rrt, rrt_max] in Metric (From GT key_observations: paymentservice-0 rrt p99 increased from 2127.52 to 2472178.23, rrt_max p99 from 3260.76 to 2543459.37)

Step 8: Derive Root Cause - Based on network connection errors, timeouts, and extreme latency spikes in network-related metrics, determined cause is [rrt, rrt_max, pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets] indicating network corruption

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 'transport: Error while dialing dial tcp 10.233.55.4:50051: i/o timeout' error appeared in frontend logs
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'Error while dialing' in Log data from frontend services

critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'Unavailable' in Log data from frontend services

critical_checks.instruction: Check Metric data for rrt and rrt_max values from paymentservice and checkoutservice

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Network packet metrics show anomalies indicating packet corruption
critical_checks.instruction: Check Metric data for network packet statistics from checkoutservice and paymentservice pods
